name: Tap In
about: Tap In is Charlotte's premier indoor golf venue located in the Lower South End area, featuring eight tour-level simulators. The venue offers a mix of golf technology, food, and drinks in a sports bar atmosphere suitable for various occasions. It provides standard and premium bays, leagues, lessons, and interactive games. Simulators feature Uneekor Eye XO technology with real-time AI coaching and access to thousands of courses worldwide. The facility can accommodate groups up to 200 guests and also offers mobile simulator rentals for off-site events.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Uneekor Eye XO precision with real-time AI feedback
Spacious premium bays with 4K resolution and complimentary clubs
Convenient location in Charlotte with year-round indoor play
Food and drinks menu available to complement the golf experience
Mobile simulator rentals available for off-site events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with crowd-pleasing favorites including shareable apps, flatbreads, burgers, salads, and late-night bites
Full bar available with drinks menu to pair with golf experience

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-level photometric camera system in all bays with real-time swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary clubs are provided in all premium bays. Standard bays may require you to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed. The venue has a full kitchen and bar serving food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole rounds take approximately 1-2 hours depending on group size and course selection.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tap In is kid-friendly and welcomes families. The venue can accommodate children and offers birthday party packages.
